mapper.select: select id as customerId, name as customerName, furigana as customerFurigana, is_deleted as customerIsDeleted, register_date_time as customerRegisterDateTime, update_date_time as customerUpdateDateTime from m_customer where is_deleted != 1 order by id asc

select id as customerId, name as customerName, furigana as customerFurigana, is_deleted as customerIsDeleted, register_date_time as customerRegisterDateTime, update_date_time as customerUpdateDateTime from m_customer where id = #{customerId} and is_deleted != 1

select id as customerId, name as customerName, furigana as customerFurigana, is_deleted as customerIsDeleted, register_date_time as customerRegisterDateTime, update_date_time as customerUpdateDateTime from m_customer where is_deleted != 1 and ( id like concat('%' , #{search} , '%') or name like concat('%' , #{search} , '%') or furigana like concat('%' , #{search} , '%') ) order by ${sortItem} ${sort}
mapper.update: update m_customer set name = #{customerName}, furigana = #{customerFurigana} where id = #{customerId}
